name: Pi 도메인
func:
msg.payload = 'ida.mango-larch.ts.net';
return msg;

name: Pi tick 시간

command: /bin/sh -c '/sbin/iwgetid -r 2>/dev/null || /usr/sbin/iwgetid -r 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/nmcli -t -f ACTIVE,SSID dev wifi 2>/dev/null | grep "^yes:" | head -1 | cut -d: -f2- || (for w in wlan0 wlan1 wlp2s0; do s=$(iwgetid -r -i "$w" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$s" ] && echo "$s" && exit 0; done) || /usr/bin/nmcli -g GENERAL.CONNECTION dev show wlan0 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo -'
name: WiFi SSID

command: /bin/sh -c 'for w in wlan0 wlan1 wlp2s0; do a=$(ip -4 -o addr show $w 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$4}" | cut -d/ -f1 | head -1); [ -n "$a" ] && echo "$a" && exit 0; done; /usr/bin/nmcli -g IP4.ADDRESS dev show wlan0 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d/ -f1 | grep -E "^[0-9]" || /usr/bin/nmcli -g IP4.ADDRESS dev show wlan1 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d/ -f1 | grep -E "^[0-9]" || hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$1}" || echo -'
name: IP

command: /bin/sh -c 'ip -4 -o addr show tailscale0 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$4}" | cut -d/ -f1 | head -1 || echo -'
name: Tailscale IP

command: /bin/sh -c 'systemctl is-active nodered 2>/dev/null || systemctl is-active node-red 2>/dev/null || echo inactive'
name: Node-RED 서비스
D2 tele 전달
tele→Arduino SSID/IP
모니터 스위치·요약 CSS
format:
<style>
/* 참고: 스마트팜 펌프 UI — md-switch 확대 + 모니터 요약 카드 */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mon-sw{
  transform: scale(1.32);
  transform-origin: left center;
  margin: 10px 0 6px 0;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mon-sw .md-label{
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
}

/* 모니터(SVG) 토글 버튼 */
.cf-svg-toggle{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  padding:6px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
}
.cf-svg-toggle:hover{ background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); }
.cf-svg-wrap{ display:flex; align-items:center; }
.cf-svg-text{ font-weight: 900; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size: 12px; }
.cf-svg-text.on{ color: #b8ffd0; }
.cf-svg-text.off{ color: #ffd0d0; }

.cf-dash-grid{ width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; }
.cf-dash-head{
  display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  padding:8px 0 12px; margin-bottom:10px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.cf-dash-t{ color:var(--cf-muted); font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.04em; }
.cf-dash-code{ font-size:11px; color:var(--cf-text); opacity:.92; max-width:100%; word-break:break-all; }
.cf-dash-cards{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(148px, 1fr));
  gap:10px;
}
.cf-dash-card{
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}
.cf-dash-card-t{ font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--cf-text); margin-bottom:8px; }
.cf-dash-pills{ display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.cf-dash-p{ font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:999px; }
.cf-dash-p.on{ background:rgba(0,200,83,.22); color:#b8ffd0; border:1px solid rgba(0,200,83,.5); }
.cf-dash-p.on.inactive{ opacity:.4; }
.cf-dash-p.au{ background:rgba(79,140,255,.2); color:#c8d9ff; border:1px solid rgba(79,140,255,.45); }
.cf-dash-p.au.inactive{ opacity:.38; }
.cf-dash-timer{ margin-top:6px; font-size:10px; color:var(--cf-muted); }
</style>

name: 모니터 요약 payload
채널 카드 요약
format:
DEVICE {{msg.deviceId}} tele 요약 {{msg.teleShort || '—'}}
{{r.label}}
{{r.on ? '🟢 ON' : '🔴 OFF'}} {{r.auto ? '⚙ AUTO' : '✋ MAN'}}
⏱ 주기 ON {{r.onSec}}s / OFF {{r.offSec}}s
📊 ON {{msg.stats.onCh}}/{{msg.stats.total}} 🤖 AUTO {{msg.stats.autoCh}}/{{msg.stats.total}}

label: CronusFarm Dashboard v2
info:
CronusFarm Dashboard (A/B Bed)

- 모니터 탭: A/B Bed 상태
- 설정 탭: 자동/수동(채널별) + 시간 설정(펌프 ON/OFF 분·초)

MQTT
- status: cronusfarm/<DEVICE_ID>/status
- tele  : cronusfarm/<DEVICE_ID>/tele
- cmd   : cronusfarm/<DEVICE_ID>/cmd

DEVICE_ID 기본: cronusfarm-01
Node-RED(피에서 실행) → 브로커: 127.0.0.1:1883 / 아두이노는 secrets.h 의 MQTT_HOST(예: ida… 또는 Pi LAN IP)

func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload||'').toString().trim() || '-';
return msg;

name: ssid 정리
func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload||'').toString().trim() || '(미연결)';
return msg;

name: ip 정리
tailscale ip 정리
func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload||'').toString().trim() || '-';
return msg;

name: nodered 정리
mosquitto 정리

flow.set('arduinoLastStatusMs', Date.now());
return msg;

label: CronusFarm FlexDash
info:
FlexDash(드래그/반응형) 전용 UI
- 접속: http://<pi>:1880/flexdash
- 타일(toggle)로 채널 ON/OFF
- tele(topic=led_*, pump_*)를 받아 타일 상태 동기화

name: FlexDash: 수동고정+ON/OFF
CronusFarm CSS
format:
<style>
:root{
  --cf-bg:#0b1220;
  --cf-card:#0f1b31;
  --cf-text:#e6edf7;
  --cf-muted:#9db0cc;
  --cf-accent:#4f8cff;
}
body.nr-dashboard-theme md-content{
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #070c15 0%, var(--cf-bg) 60%, #070c15 100%) !important;
  color: var(--cf-text) !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-template{
  background: var(--cf-card) !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel .md-title{ color: var(--cf-text) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel .md-subhead{ color: var(--cf-muted) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch .md-bar{ opacity:.75; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.md-checked .md-bar{ background: rgba(79,140,255,.55) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.md-checked .md-thumb{ background: var(--cf-accent) !important; }

/* 자동/수동 모드 스위치: ON=자동(녹색), OFF=수동(빨강) */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mode .md-bar{ background: rgba(220,53,69,.45) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mode .md-thumb{ background: rgba(220,53,69,1) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mode.md-checked .md-bar{ background: rgba(40,167,69,.55) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.cf-mode.md-checked .md-thumb{ background: rgba(40,167,69,1) !important; }

/* raw text blocks (status/tele/cmd): wrap + thin font + scroll */
.cf-raw{ width:100%; }
.cf-raw-title{ color: var(--cf-muted); font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.cf-raw pre{
  margin:0;
  padding:10px 12px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border-radius: 12px;
  color: var(--cf-text);
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.35;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  max-height: 140px;
  overflow: auto;
}

/* tele 요약 + 보조 텍스트 */
.cf-muted{ color: var(--cf-muted); font-size: 11px; }
.cf-tele-preview{ width:100%; margin-top: 6px; }
.cf-tele-preview pre{
  margin:0;
  padding:8px 10px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border-radius: 10px;
  color: var(--cf-text);
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
  font-size: 11px;
  line-height: 1.35;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  /* 요약 영역은 스크롤바 없이 자동 줄바꿈만 */
  max-height: none !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* 숫자 입력 스핀 숨김(남아 있는 ui_numeric 등) */
.nr-dashboard-theme input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
.nr-dashboard-theme input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button{
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  margin: 0;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme input[type=number]{ -moz-appearance: textfield; }

/* 드롭다운: tele 갱신 시 트랜지션으로 보이는 깜빡임 완화 */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-select .md-select-value{ transition:none !important; }
</style>

name: CronusFarm Pills CSS
format:
<style>
/* common row */
.cf-row{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; padding:6px 0; min-width:0; }
.cf-label{ color: var(--cf-text); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; min-width:0; }

/* A/B Bed 상태 줄: 가로 스크롤 방지(라벨 말줄임 + 폭 고정) */
.cf-row-bed{ overflow-x: hidden; width:100%; max-width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; }
.cf-row-bed .cf-label{
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.cf-row-bed .cf-pill{ flex-shrink:0; }

/* Pi 서비스 줄 */
.cf-row-pi-srv{ overflow-x: hidden; max-width:100%; }

/* ON/OFF status pills */
.cf-pill{ min-width:54px; text-align:center; padding:6px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing:.2px; }
.cf-on{ background: rgba(40,167,69,.18); border:1px solid rgba(40,167,69,.45); color:#7CFF9C; }
.cf-off{ background: rgba(220,53,69,.14); border:1px solid rgba(220,53,69,.45); color:#FF7C88; }

/* dot lamps */
.cf-dot{ width:12px; height:12px; border-radius:50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.12) inset; }
.cf-dot-on{ background: rgba(40,167,69,1); box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(40,167,69,.55); }
.cf-dot-off{ background: rgba(220,53,69,1); box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(220,53,69,.35); }

/* 모니터 탭: 탭하면 MQTT 토글(녹=ON, 적=OFF) */
.cf-mon-tap{ cursor:pointer; user-select:none; min-width:72px; text-align:center; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; font-size:13px; font-weight:800; transition: filter .12s, background .12s; }
.cf-mon-on{ background: rgba(40,167,69,.38); border:2px solid rgba(40,167,69,.9); color:#E8FFE8; }
.cf-mon-off{ background: rgba(220,53,69,.34); border:2px solid rgba(220,53,69,.82); color:#FFE8E8; }
.cf-mon-tap:active{ filter: brightness(1.1); }
</style>

name: HomeKit CSS (Dashboard2)
format:
<style>
/* HomeKit 스타일(Glassmorphism) — Dashboard 2(@flowfuse, Vuetify) + Dashboard 1 fallback */
:root{
  --hk-bg:#F2F2F7;
  --hk-card: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
  --hk-radius: 20px;
  --hk-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  --hk-text:#111;
  --hk-muted:#6b7280;
  --hk-accent:#007AFF;
  --hk-btn-top:#EEF4FF;
  --hk-btn-bot:#E2E8F8;
  --hk-btn-hover-top:#E5EEFF;
  --hk-btn-hover-bot:#D6E0F5;
  --hk-btn-text:#3d4d68;
  --hk-btn-border:rgba(160, 180, 210, 0.45);
}

/* 전체 배경 + 페이지 가로 스크롤 방지(100vw·자식 overflow 누적) */
html, body{
  background: var(--hk-bg) !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  max-width: 100%;
}

/* -------------------- Dashboard 2 (Vuetify) -------------------- */
/* Vuetify 앱 루트 */
.v-application{
  background: var(--hk-bg) !important;
  color: var(--hk-text) !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}
.v-application__wrap,
.v-main,
.v-layout{
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  max-width: 100%;
}

/* NR Dashboard 2 페이지 루트(클래스명 환경별 상이) */
[id="app"],
.v-application > div{
  max-width: 100%;
}

/* 카드(그룹/위젯) — Vuetify card/sheet 기반 */
.v-card, .v-sheet{
  background: var(--hk-card) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-radius: var(--hk-radius) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--hk-shadow) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35) !important;
}

/* 그룹(섹션) 타이틀: 환경마다 다를 수 있어 보수적으로 적용 */
.nrdb-ui-group-title, .nrdb-ui-group__title, .v-card-title, .v-toolbar-title{
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: var(--hk-text) !important;
}

/* 버튼 — 파스텔 톤 */
.v-btn{
  border-radius: 15px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--hk-btn-top) 0%, var(--hk-btn-bot) 100%) !important;
  color: var(--hk-btn-text) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--hk-btn-border) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05) !important;
  transition: transform 0.12s ease, background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.v-btn:hover{
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--hk-btn-hover-top) 0%, var(--hk-btn-hover-bot) 100%) !important;
}
.v-btn:active{ transform: scale(0.98); filter: brightness(0.97); }

/* 스위치(토글) — 과한 오버라이드는 피하고, 크기/여백만 정리 */
.v-switch{ margin-top: 0 !important; margin-bottom: 0 !important; }

/* -------------------- Dashboard 1 fallback (Angular) -------------------- */
body{ background-color: var(--hk-bg) !important; }
.nr-dashboard-group{
  background: var(--hk-card) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border-radius: var(--hk-radius) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--hk-shadow) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3) !important;
  margin: 12px !important;
  padding: 10px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-group-title{
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  color: #000 !important;
  font-size: 1.2rem !important;
  padding-bottom: 8px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-button.md-button,
.nr-dashboard-ui_button{
  border-radius: 15px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--hk-btn-top) 0%, var(--hk-btn-bot) 100%) !important;
  color: var(--hk-btn-text) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--hk-btn-border) !important;
}

/* -------------------- 반응형 타일(템플릿용) -------------------- */
.hk-container{
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 8px;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
}
.hk-card{
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  border-radius: 22px;
  padding: 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  display:flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
}
.hk-card:active{ transform: scale(0.98); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); }
.hk-icon{ font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #8E8E93; }
.hk-value{ font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: #000; margin: 4px 0; }
.hk-label{ font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #8E8E93; }

/* 작은 화면에서는 카드 간격 축소 */
@media (max-width: 420px){
  .hk-container{ gap: 10px; padding: 6px; }
  .hk-card{ padding: 14px; border-radius: 18px; }
}
</style>

name: HTML 헤더 설정
요약(JSON) 만들기
